ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neurons" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neuron data entry */,
  "neuron_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neuron instance */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Array of distances measured for the neuron */,
  "conductance" TEXT /* Array of conductance values for the neuron */,
  "neuron_type" TEXT /* Type of neuron (e.g., apic, basilar) */,
  "neuron_name" TEXT /* Names of specific neuron instances */,
  "ipsc" REAL /* Inhibitory postsynaptic current value associated with the neuron */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the neuron within the brain */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cell (e.g., pyramidal, interneuron) */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of data collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the neuron data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neurons_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neurons_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neurons_neuron_type FOREIGN KEY ("neuron_type") REFERENCES neuron_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "neuron_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the neuron type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the neuron type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neuron type */,
  "parent_type" INTEGER /* ID of the parent neuron type (for hierarchical classification) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the neuron type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the neuron type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the neuron type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment setup */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neuron data entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated experiment */,
  "data_entry_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the data */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of data logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data entry (e.g., pending review, approved) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES neurons ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neuron data accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of data accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES neurons ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neuron associated with the results */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis conducted */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Data resulting from the analysis in JSON format */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the analysis */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the analysis is part of */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of data analyzed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis result (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES neurons ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of data */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., distance, conductance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent data type (for hierarchical classification) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data type */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conductance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conductance record */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neuron */,
  "conductance_value" REAL /* Value of conductance measured */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the conductance value */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of data recorded (e.g., conductance) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the conductance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conductance_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conductance_records_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conductance_records_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES neurons ("node_id")
)
